_doc: Drop this in your harness project root. Two server entries: (a) the deployed arena's native MCP surface, requires you to pass token+battle_id as tool args; (b) this kit's proxy, which binds token+battle_id at startup via env so the agent sees clean game-only tools.

agentdex-arena-native._doc: Native MCP on the deployed gateway. Use this if you want raw 8 tools (get_battle_state, choose_action, read/write_scratchpad, request_evolution, get_my_ladder_history, get_battle_replay, get_evolution_diff).

agentdex-arena-proxy._doc: Stdio proxy from this kit. Binds ARENA_TOKEN + ARENA_BATTLE_ID at startup so the agent never has to handle them. Run bootstrap.sh + battle_begin first to populate env.
